info.title: Planning Center People
info.description: Planning Center People helps you manage contact data, membership info, and everything you need to know about your people with confidence.

tags.name: Person
tags.description: A person record represents a single member/user of the application. Each person has different permissions that determine how the user can use this app (if at all).

tags.name: List
tags.description: A list is a powerful tool for finding and grouping people together using any criteria imaginable.

tags.name: FieldDefinition
tags.description: A field definition represents a custom field -- its name, data type, etc.

tags.name: Tab
tags.description: A tab is a custom tab and groups like field definitions.

tags.name: Campus
tags.description: A Campus is a location belonging to an Organization

tags.name: FormCategory
tags.description: A Form Category

tags.name: Form
tags.description: A custom form for people to fill out.

tags.name: Household
tags.description: A household links people together and can have a primary contact. To add a person to an existing household, use the HouseholdMemberships endpoint.

tags.name: ListCategory
tags.description: A List Category

tags.name: App
tags.description: An app is one of the handful of apps that Planning Center offers that organizations can subscribe to, e.g. Services, Registrations, etc.

tags.name: Message
tags.description: A message is an individual email or sms text sent to a member. Every message has a parent message group.

tags.name: MessageGroup
tags.description: A message group represents one or more emails or text messages sent from one of the Planning Center apps. The message group indicates the from person, app, etc.

tags.name: NoteCategory
tags.description: A Note Category

tags.name: NoteCategorySubscription
tags.description: A subscription for note categories

tags.name: Address
tags.description: An address represents a physical and/or mailing address for a person.

tags.name: BackgroundCheck
tags.description: Background Checks for a Person

tags.name: BirthdayPeople
tags.description:
Returns upcoming birthdays for the organization.

Note: This endpoint will always only return the first 15 people having a birthday in the next 30 days, ordered by birthday, ascending.

tags.name: Email
tags.description: An email represents an email address and location.

tags.name: FieldDatum
tags.description: A field datum is an individual piece of data for a custom field.

tags.name: InactiveReason
tags.description: An inactive reason is a small bit of text indicating why a member is no longer active.

tags.name: MaritalStatus
tags.description: A martial status represents a member's current status, e.g. married, single, etc.

tags.name: MembershipType
tags.description: A profile's membership type, e.g. Visitor, Regular Attender, Member, etc.

tags.name: NamePrefix
tags.description: A name prefix is one of Mr., Mrs., etc.

tags.name: NameSuffix
tags.description: A name suffix is one of Sr., Jr., etc.

tags.name: Note
tags.description: A note is text with a category connected to a person’s profile.

tags.name: PeopleImport
tags.description: A PeopleImport is a record of an ongoing or previous import from a CSV file.

tags.name: PhoneNumber
tags.description: A phone number represents a single telephone number and location.

tags.name: Report
tags.description: A report is editable liquid syntax that provides a powerful tool for presenting your Lists however you want.

tags.name: SchoolOption
tags.description: A school option represents a school name, school type, grades, etc. and can be selected for a person.

tags.name: SocialProfile
tags.description: A social profile represents a members's Twitter, Facebook, or other social media account.

tags.name: SpamEmailAddress
tags.description: An email address that is marked as spam

tags.name: OrganizationStatistics
tags.description: Returns statistics for the organization.

tags.name: Workflow
tags.description: A Workflow

Authorization: Basic BASE64(client_id:secret)"
